reviews.comment:
Esperando en la fila, pusieron un bonete naranja delante del auto y nos hicieron retirar sin explicación, a pesar de que es la última estación de carga por muchos kilómetros hacia el Valle.

(Translated by Google)
While waiting in line, they put an orange bonnet in front of the car and made us leave without explanation, even though it is the last charging station for many miles toward the Valley.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnZ3VuWDF3RRAB
